loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql:
select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no) as memname ,sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint ,sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_group ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'DD MONTH YYYY') as begining_contract_th ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'DD/MM/YYYY') as begining_of_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id
,nvl((select sum(sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount) from sc_lon_m_req_fee ,sc_lon_m_ucf_fee where sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type = sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type ='01'),0) as free_01
,nvl((select sum(sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount) from sc_lon_m_req_fee ,sc_lon_m_ucf_fee where sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type = sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type ='29'),0) as free_07
,nvl((select sum(sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount) from sc_lon_m_req_fee ,sc_lon_m_ucf_fee where sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type = sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type ='09'),0) as free_09
,nvl((select sum(sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount) from sc_lon_m_req_fee ,sc_lon_m_ucf_fee where sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type = sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type ='08'),0) as free_08
,nvl((select sum(sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount) from sc_lon_m_req_fee ,sc_lon_m_ucf_fee where sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type = sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type ='06'),0) as free_06
,nvl((select sum(sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount) from sc_lon_m_req_fee ,sc_lon_m_ucf_fee where sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type = sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type in('47','48')),0) as free_10
,(select sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_acc_no from sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid where sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.type_pay_money in('TRB','ATM') )as bank_acc_no
,sc_lon_m_contract.paid_loan_id
,( select sum(total_interest) from sc_com_m_receipt where receipt_no = sc_lon_m_contract.receipt_no) as total_int
,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_id
from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_request ,sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info
where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no and sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status = '1'
/*WHERE*/
